player_notes.stephen curry: Ruled out for at least 2 more games (knee), extending absence to 25+ consecutive games. Avoid all Curry props; monitor GSW rotation for usage boosts elsewhere.
player_notes.luka doncic: Picked up his 16th technical foul vs. Nets; faces a 1-game suspension if upheld. High suspension risk — monitor ruling before betting any Doncic props today.
player_notes.jarrett allen: Returned from injury vs. Heat, played only 18 minutes (scored 18). Likely on a minutes restriction — temper rebounds/points props until role clarifies.

game_notes.GSW vs DEN: Stephen Curry remains out (knee, 25+ game absence). Elevated usage expected for Curry's replacement guards/wings in this matchup.
